data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"ac1b-5e35","generatedAt":"2026-04-10T01:57:58Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"PR comment response: accept/defend/defer for engineer-authored PR review comments","description":"After epic 1083-fb3d shifts the merge workflow to PR-based delivery, AI agents have no mechanism to respond to engineer review comments. This epic adds a systematic accept/defend/defer response loop for both inline and top-level PR comments, with standalone and merge-integrated entry points sharing a common pr-comment-response.sh script.","successCriteria":["SC1: pr-comment-response.sh fetches/normalizes PR comments with schema {comment_id, root_comment_id, thread_url, body, author, is_inline, already_replied, defense_comment_id, path, position}","SC2: Accept handler \u2014 fix sub-agent + commit + push + reply with SHA; revert + defer on multi-file/conflict/no-change","SC3: Defend handler \u2014 post PR review comment (not source code comment) + thread reply; defense_comment_id idempotency","SC4: Defer handler \u2014 create tracking ticket + write ID to JSON + reply","SC5: merge-to-main.sh comment_response phase after CI, before merge; CI re-poll after accept commits; --resume compatible","SC6: /dso:respond-to-pr-comments standalone skill; PR URL or number; summary table output","SC7: pr_comments.human_in_loop config (default: false); CI/no-TTY fallback to autonomous","SC8: Embedded classification prompt in SKILL.md (accept/defend/defer; ambiguous \u2192 defer; defense text output)","SC9: Integration test suite with mock GitHub API fixture; no real API calls escape"]},"stories":[{"id":"b3b3-9463","title":"Write failing integration tests for PR comment response","description":"Integration test suite with mock GitHub API fixture for one accept/defend/defer comment including reply-in-thread. RED-state baseline.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Mock fixture exists with accept/defend/defer comments including reply-in-thread","Test suite confirmed FAILING (RED) before any implementation story begins","Mock enforces no real gh api or MCP calls escape"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC9"},{"id":"238c-d60a","title":"Fetch and normalize PR comments (pr-comment-response.sh)","description":"New shell script that fetches all unresolved PR comments via MCP or gh api and writes normalized JSON with shared reply-posting utility.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Produces normalized JSON matching schema {comment_id, root_comment_id, thread_url, body, author, is_inline, already_replied, defense_comment_id, path, position}","root_comment_id walked to null; cycle guard implemented","Sentinel-deduplicated threads excluded","Empty result exits 0; API failure exits non-zero with ERROR:","Shared thread-reply posting function with is_inline routing"],"considerations":["[Security] GITHUB_TOKEN never in output (A02:2021)","[Reliability] max-depth guard on root_comment_id chain walk","[Reliability] Rate-limit backoff on paginated fetch","[Maintainability] MCP probe as reusable shared function","[Integration] gh CLI minimum version check at startup"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["b3b3-9463"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1"},{"id":"0fb0-e23a","title":"Accept handler \u2014 fix sub-agent, commit, push, reply with SHA","description":"Accept action handler: fix sub-agent dispatch, commit/push, thread reply. Revert + defer on failure/conflict.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Accept-classified comment dispatches fix sub-agent; handler commits and pushes","Multi-file/conflict/no-change triggers full working-tree revert + reclassify to defer","Non-fast-forward push triggers revert + reclassify","Reply includes commit SHA and sentinel"],"considerations":["[Security] Comment body not interpolated into shell commands (A03:2021)","[Reliability] Full working-tree revert verified clean before reclassify","[Testing] Partial-failure path coverage required"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["b3b3-9463","238c-d60a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2"},{"id":"4949-c6a8","title":"Defend handler \u2014 PR review comment + thread reply","description":"Defend action handler: post PR review comment (not source code comment), write defense_comment_id, thread reply. Two-step idempotency.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["PR review comment posted via correct is_inline-based endpoint","defense_comment_id written to JSON before thread reply","Retry with non-null defense_comment_id skips step 1","422 fallback to /issues/{n}/comments","Thread reply links to review comment with sentinel"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Two-step non-atomicity test coverage \u2014 retry skips step 1","[Reliability] 422 fallback path tested","[Testing] Both is_inline=true and is_inline=false paths tested independently"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["b3b3-9463","238c-d60a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3"},{"id":"93cb-ef60","title":"Defer handler \u2014 create tracking ticket, write ID to JSON, reply","description":"Defer action handler: create DSO ticket, write ID before reply, post thread reply with ticket reference.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Defer-classified comment creates DSO tracking ticket","Ticket ID written to JSON before reply posted","Reply includes ticket ID, rationale, sentinel","Retry skips creation when ticket ID already present"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Ticket ID persisted before reply \u2014 retry does not create duplicate","[Testing] Ticket creation failure prevents reply (fail-safe)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["b3b3-9463","238c-d60a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4"},{"id":"176e-905b","title":"Standalone skill /dso:respond-to-pr-comments \u2014 classification + handler orchestration","description":"New skill SKILL.md with embedded LLM classification prompt (accept/defend/defer + defense text output) and per-comment handler dispatch. Foundation split.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["/dso:respond-to-pr-comments prints summary table after processing all comments","'No unresolved comments found' when empty","Classification prompt produces accept/defend/defer with defense text for defend cases"],"considerations":["[Testing] Deterministic classification smoke tests with pre-classified fixtures","[Reliability] Concurrent runs: sentinel deduplication only \u2014 document as known limitation","[Maintainability] Classification outputs defense text (not just label) for defend cases"],"scopeSplitCandidate":true,"splitRole":"foundation","splitPairId":"8528-6f36","blockedBy":["b3b3-9463","0fb0-e23a","4949-c6a8","93cb-ef60"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC6+SC8"},{"id":"8528-6f36","title":"Human-in-loop autonomy config for PR comment response","description":"pr_comments.human_in_loop config key \u2014 propose-before-act mode; CI/no-TTY fallback to autonomous. Enhancement of 176e-905b.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["human_in_loop=true \u2192 propose + confirm before each handler","CI/no-TTY \u2192 autonomous fallback with warning","Absent key \u2192 false"],"considerations":["[Reliability] TTY detection before any confirmation prompt \u2014 no deadlock in CI","[Maintainability] Code note: key may be superseded by 7ac3-71a1"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":"enhancement","splitPairId":"176e-905b","blockedBy":["176e-905b"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC7"},{"id":"ac9b-ef7d","title":"merge-to-main.sh comment_response phase","description":"New comment_response phase in merge-to-main.sh after CI and before merge. CI re-poll after accept commits. --resume compatible.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["comment_response in _ALL_PHASES after ci_trigger and before merge","CI re-poll against updated HEAD after accept commits","--resume from pre-migration state file handles missing phase correctly"],"considerations":["[Reliability] ci_trigger must include CI wait (not just fire); verify before phase positioning","[Reliability] State file schema extended for comment_response","[Performance] CI re-poll adds runtime \u2014 document expected impact"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["176e-905b"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5"},{"id":"46ae-e53d","title":"Update project docs to reflect PR comment response workflow","description":"CLAUDE.md Quick Reference + Architecture section + CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md updates.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md Quick Reference includes /dso:respond-to-pr-comments","CLAUDE.md Architecture lists comment_response in merge-to-main phases","CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md includes pr_comments.human_in_loop"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["238c-d60a","0fb0-e23a","4949-c6a8","93cb-ef60","176e-905b","8528-6f36","ac9b-ef7d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":9,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["b3b3-9463","238c-d60a","93cb-ef60","176e-905b"]}}
